purpose: Upper-bound feasibility check for the allowed zero-latency feature space using strong models and offline teacher labels.

interpretation_rule.positive: If any strong model routes roughly 37.5-52% to LOW while meeting target accuracy, the allowed feature space contains enough information and the next problem is hardware-friendly compression.
interpretation_rule.negative: If all strong models remain far below 37.5% LOW, the allowed feature space likely lacks the information needed to match the notebook record, parallel, or cascade baselines.
